must_do.full_text:
Good new first: Sol is a smart, efficient, and a significant step forward. It is the same price as GPT-5.5. Also launching in the GPT-5.6 family is Terra, with 5.5-level performance at half the price.

Bad news: at the request of the US government, it is launching today in

must_do.full_text:
OpenAI and Microsoft are being sued by the owners of 400 local newspapers nationwide for mass copyright infringement.

The publishers claim the two tech companies illegally scraped their content to train their AI models — jeopardizing local journalism in the US.
must_do.summary: OpenAI和Microsoft被400家美国地方报纸起诉，指控其非法爬取内容用于AI模型训练，威胁本地新闻业生存。涉及AI伦理和版权争议的重大事件。
